segments.text: Oh, okay, forward throw, it's not gonna be enough here.
I love the jump over it, of course,
and that up B's always gonna be so active.
170% here, Leo not wanting to switch to the Pyra.

full_text: Oh, okay, forward throw, it's not gonna be enough here. I love the jump over it, of course, and that up B's always gonna be so active. 170% here, Leo not wanting to switch to the Pyra.
